hero.title: Experience Premier
hero.subtitle: Watch major leagues like Premier League, Champions League, La Liga... in high definition, with no ads, and live English commentaries.
live.section_subtitle: Real-time live score updates, stream HD with no buffering.
features.title: Why Choose WebFootballLive?
features.subtitle: The most modern and stable football live streaming platform.
features.f1_desc: Sharp images, smooth 60fps frame rates, and low latency technology ensure you never miss any goal scoring moments.
features.f2_desc: Professional, funny, and engaging commentators bring the stadium atmosphere straight to your screen.
features.f3_desc: View real-time statistics including ball possession, shots on target, corners, and cards updated automatically during the match.
cta.title: Never Miss Any Goal
cta.subtitle: Subscribe to get notifications about match schedules and direct streaming links of your favorite teams.
support.title: Help Center &
support.subtitle: How can we help you today? Find quick answers below or send us feedback.
support.contact_subtitle: If you experience lagging or broken streaming links, please send a quick report to our technical team.
support.faq.q1: How do I fix video freezing?
support.faq.a1: Try refreshing the page (F5) or switching to alternative backup servers (Server 2, Server 3) available on the video player.
support.faq.a2: Absolutely. We provide a completely free, non-profit football live streaming service for sports fans.
support.faq.q3: Can I watch on my mobile phone or Smart TV?
support.faq.a3: Yes. Our website is fully responsive and compatible with browsers on iOS, Android, and Smart TVs.
support.faq.q4: How do I know the broadcast schedule of my favorite team?
support.faq.a4: Please visit the Schedule menu at the top of the page to view the daily updated list of matches.
form.name: Your name
form.message_placeholder: Describe the issue you are facing or the match you need help with...
form.success: Feedback sent successfully! Our technical team will inspect and fix the issue immediately.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: The security and safety of our viewers is the top priority at WebFootballLive.
privacy.intro: Welcome to WebFootballLive. We are committed to protecting your privacy and providing a secure streaming environment.
privacy.s1_desc: We do not require you to create an account or provide personal information to watch streams. We only record anonymous technical data such as IP address or browser to optimize video stream routing.
privacy.s2_desc: We use cookies to remember your language preferences and track matches you frequently view for quick recommendations.
privacy.s3_desc: Football live streams are aggregated from publicly shared free resources on the internet. We do not host any video content on our servers and always respect the copyright of official broadcasting stations.
terms.title: Terms
terms.subtitle: Regulations and conditions for using our live streaming services at WebFootballLive.
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before joining our football live streaming community.
terms.s1_desc: By accessing WebFootballLive, you agree to comply with our non-commercial terms of use and polite behavior guidelines in the live chat rooms.
terms.s2_desc: Any spamming of promotional links, illegal betting advertisement, or hateful language lashing out at players, referees, and other viewers in chat rooms is strictly prohibited. Violations will result in a permanent chat ban.
terms.s3_desc: We strive to provide the most stable connections but do not warrant that services will be 100% uninterrupted due to global internet issues or technical problems on the source broadcasts.
footer.tagline: High quality HD football live stream, live scores updated 24/7
